resultList.dtldesc: Explore this charming 2 BHK flat for sale in Singayyanapalya, Bangalore. Perfectly situated, this property offers a blend of comfort and convenience in one of the city's sought-after neighborhoods.::::::Property Specifications ::::::This unfurnished 2 BHK flat offers a spacious living experience with a super built-up area of 1050 sqft. Located on the 4th floor of a 5-floor building, the flat is designed to provide both comfort and functionality. The property features two well-sized bedrooms and two bathrooms, including one attached bathroom with the master bedroom and one common bathroom, both equipped with modern western-style fixtures and geysers. The flat includes a living-cum-dining area that is ideal for family gatherings and daily activities.::::::Enjoy the convenience of a modular kitchen, complete with a chimney and a piped gas connection. The kitchen also has an attached utility area for added practicality. The flooring throughout the flat is vitrified, offering a sleek and durable surface. The flat includes one balcony attached to the hall, providing a pleasant view of the adjacent buildings. It is Vastu compliant and faces north, aligning with traditional principles for a harmonious living environment.::::::Facilities ::::::This 2 BHK flat comes with a range of essential facilities to enhance your living experience. The property includes covered parking for your convenience and a 24-hour water supply to ensure uninterrupted access. For added comfort, the flat features 100% power backup, security guards, and installed CCTVs, ensuring a safe and secure environment. Additionally, the building has a lift for easy access to all floors.::::::Locality ::::::This flat is ideally located near Singayyanapalya Metro Station, less than 100 meters away, providing excellent connectivity. Essential services such as schools and hospitals are nearby, ensuring convenience for daily needs. Phoenix Mall is just 200 meters from the property, offering a wide range of shopping and dining options. Public transport is readily available with buses and autos providing easy access. Banks and ATMs are also within close proximity. Additionally, K.R. Puram Railway Station is just 2 km away, further enhancing travel options.

resultList.dtldesc: This luxurious 3 BHK villa offers an outstanding residential opportunity for homebuyers seeking an independent, grand, and highly sophisticated urban home. Situated in Stage 1st Nagarbhavi, within the prominent Chandra Layout enclave in West Bangalore, this premium independent house presents a masterful blend of expansive structural layout and timeless residential appeal. Designed to deliver an upscale lifestyle, this property provides a sanctuary of privacy and comfort within an established, well-connected community.Property SpecificationsSpanning a massive super area of 2500 sq. ft, this semi-furnished villa features an intelligent architectural layout designed to maximize spatial efficiency, cross-ventilation, and natural light. The sprawling multi-level residence comprises three grand bedrooms, three well-appointed bathrooms, and private balconies that open up to pleasant views of the leafy neighborhood. This north-facing independent structure is designed to welcome ample morning sunlight and steady fresh air throughout the interior spaces. The property is finished with premium flooring materials that elevate its contemporary design, and holding a clear freehold ownership status, this ready-to-move resale asset stands as a highly secure real estate investment.FacilitiesThe independent villa is fully supported by excellent essential infrastructure and utilities to ensure a convenient and completely independent lifestyle. The property features a spacious, dedicated covered parking garage that comfortably accommodates personal vehicles, along with additional open parking room for visitors. A highly reliable water supply framework is integrated directly into the system, ensuring an uninterrupted flow for daily household management and landscaping. The standalone structure allows for complete freedom to integrate specialized security systems, rooftop solar panels, or automated backup frameworks as desired by the owner.LocalityThe property occupies an enviable position within Chandra Layout, widely recognized as one of the most upscale and self-sufficient residential neighbourhoods in Bangalore. This premier location offers exceptional transport connectivity, placing residents within close proximity to major arterial roads and public transit systems that make traveling across the city completely effortless. The immediate surrounding area is rich in superior social infrastructure, placing top-tier educational institutions, reputed multi-specialty hospitals, and comprehensive banking services within short driving distance. Everyday retail, premium dining establishments, and recreational parks are all easily accessible in this family-oriented neighbourhood, establishing it as an ideal destination for modern residential living.
